title: ateleia ovata
intro: Ateleia ovata, also known as False Rue-leaved Grass, is a flowering plant species native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Ateleia ovata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ateleia ovata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Ateleia ovata is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties, and it can also be used as a folk remedy for various ailments.
